sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n76321" key="o)yi/klwy" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὀψί-κλωψ</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">κλωπος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n76321.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">one who steals at night</tr_>, <abbr TEIform="abbr">f.l. in</abbr> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1617.tlg001:2:5" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Polem.Phgn.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.5</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
